src: A Meowth pokemon toy sitting and waving hands, in hyper-realistic anime-inspired style. It has oversized embroidered eyes and sharply defined lines around its face and limbs.
edit: A Meowth pokemon toy in a sci-fi style, sitting and waving metallic hands. Its eyes are LED screens with patterns, glowing circuits on its surface, articulated limbs, and holographic lines on its face, with a blue energy field around it, in a futuristic design.

per_image_non_shared_src.0: The Pokemon is on a dark wooden table in the room corner, viewed slightly from above, with plain white walls.
per_image_non_shared_src.1: The Pokémon is viewed slightly from above, placed on a white metal lattice in a room corner with plain white walls.
per_image_non_shared_src.2: A Pokemon is lying on a black background.
per_image_non_shared_src.3: The Pokémon is viewed slightly from below, sitting on a metal stick, with one leg hanging down and one partially hidden, against a plain white background.

per_image_non_shared_edit.0: A biomechanical entity viewed from above on a sleek metallic surface, angled towards a room corner with illuminated walls. It has iridescent circuits on its skin and a mix of organic and robotic elements. A minimalistic room with holographic interfaces in the background.
per_image_non_shared_edit.1: A futuristic Pokémon seen from a diagonal, elevated view on a white alloy lattice in a corner of a room with smooth white synthetic walls and luminescent lines. Floating holographic displays offer interfaces, within a sci-fi atmosphere.
per_image_non_shared_edit.2: A futuristic Pokémon rests on a jet-black digital plane amidst glowing circuit patterns. Its features have neon outlines. The setting has a holographic feel, with a dark background and vibrant light, creating a high-tech aesthetic.
per_image_non_shared_edit.3: A futuristic creature viewed from below perches on a metallic rod, one sleek robotic leg hanging down, another partially concealed. The backdrop is stark white. Multiple LEDs flicker on its body and the rod has glowing circuits, all within a sci-fi narrative.
